Hero.name: Andres Rios
Hero.description: focused on developing efficient, scalable and well-designed technological solutions.

About.title: About <highlight>me</highlight>
About.paragraph1: I am a software engineer in training, focused on developing efficient and well-structured digital solutions. I currently dedicate much of my time to strengthening my skills through projects and continuous learning.
About.paragraph2: On a personal level, I enjoy exploring new technologies, working on my own ideas, and immersing myself in video games and music that create unique experiences. I consider myself curious, self-taught, and always in search of new challenges that help me grow both professionally and personally.

experience.title: Academic Experience
experience.subtitle: My educational journey and professional development

software.title: Software Engineering
software.description: Professional training focused on software development, system architecture, and modern technologies. Development of full projects applying best practices and agile methodologies.
highlights: Full stack development with modern technologies

systems.title: Systems Technician
systems.description: Technical training in information systems, programming, and database management. Strong foundations for software development.

maintenance.title: Computer Equipment Maintenance Technician
maintenance.description: Technical training in preventive and corrective maintenance of computer equipment, networks, and technical support. First foundation in the world of technology.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about working with me

items.name: María González
items.text: Andres demonstrated exceptional dedication in every project. His ability to solve complex problems and deliver high-quality solutions is admirable. A reliable and committed professional.

items.name: Carlos Mendoza
items.text: It is a pleasure working with Andres. His curiosity and ability to quickly learn new technologies make him stand out. He always looks for the best solution and shares his knowledge with the team.

items.name: Laura Fernández
items.text: Andres has a great ability to turn ideas into clean and functional code. His attention to detail and commitment to quality make every collaboration productive and enriching.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have a project in mind? I would love to hear from you

left.title: Connect with me
left.description: I am available for collaboration opportunities, freelance projects, or just a conversation about technology.
